title: Savings clause
doc_html:
§520.  Savings clause

This Chapter shall not affect an action or proceeding commenced or right accrued before this Chapter takes effect.

Acts 2008, No. 877, §1.
doc_text:
§520.  Savings clause
This Chapter shall not affect an action or proceeding commenced or right accrued before this Chapter takes effect.
Acts 2008, No. 877, §1.
